title: Swarm: LinGet v0.2 terminal-first trustworthy loop
description:
Swarm molecule orchestrating epic linget-206.

Epic: linget-206
Coordinator: root

title: Integrate and publish ten-user prerelease
description: Merge reviewed swarm branches, run all gates, update Beads, publish v0.2.0 prerelease, verify remote artifacts, and record cohort activation and retention gates.
acceptance_criteria: Prerelease is downloadable and smoke-tested; cohort scorecard exists; promotion is blocked until agreed thresholds pass.

title: Harden Stable provider contracts
description: Add APT, Flatpak, and npm conformance fixtures plus disposable-environment plan/install/update/remove/verify tests and enforce provider tiers.
acceptance_criteria: Every advertised Stable operation has argv safety, error mapping, plan, execution, and verification coverage; release blocks on failures.

title: Implement verified transaction engine
description: Add provider-owned operation plans, risks, structured errors, serialized execution, post-state verification receipts, atomic versioned persistence, and truthful cancellation for APT, Flatpak, and npm.
acceptance_criteria: Stable provider operations execute only reviewed non-expired plans and finish with Verified, Mismatch, or Inconclusive receipts.

title: Restore green baseline
description: Apply repository Rust formatting in the clean integration branch, split CI visibility, and establish passing format, Clippy, tests, release build, and smoke baselines.
acceptance_criteria: cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test, and cargo build --release pass from a clean worktree.

title: Make TUI the default optional-GUI product
description: Feature-gate all GTK/Relm4 dependencies, add a reusable library seam, make no-argument launch enter the TUI, preserve linget tui, and keep GUI compilable only with the gui feature.
acceptance_criteria: Default dependency tree and ldd contain no GTK stack; linget launches and restores TUI; cargo check --features gui passes.

title: LinGet v0.2 terminal-first trustworthy loop
description: Ship a standalone TUI-first v0.2 prerelease with verified plan-execute-recover behavior, Stable APT/Flatpak/npm providers, optional frozen GUI, reproducible packaging, and ten-user validation.
acceptance_criteria: All child beads closed; clean integration branch passes full gates; v0.2 prerelease artifacts are downloadable and smoke-tested; git and Beads state are pushed.

title: Ship reproducible v0.2 artifacts and trust surface
description: Build x86_64 and ARM64 GNU tarballs and debs, checksums, SBOMs, provenance, safe install/update/uninstall lifecycle, pinned workflows, SECURITY policy, issue forms, and TUI-first docs.
acceptance_criteria: Artifacts install without GTK, verify checksums, restore PTYs, uninstall cleanly, and pass download-based release smoke.

title: Rework TUI into Today Browse Queue
description: Centralize navigation, make Today default, make Queue always enterable, consume backend plans and receipts, add responsive tiers, onboarding, ASCII mode, and remove hidden-focus states.
acceptance_criteria: Today Browse and Queue render at all supported widths; Enter never mutates directly; Queue opens empty; all focused regions are visible.
